description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:27.3.1-cli image with a docker:27.3.1-dind service, set CONTAINER_IMAGE, DOCKER_DRIVER and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY variables, and define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add jobs build-branch (except devel, master, rc, tags), build-devel (only devel), build-local (only tags), build-master (only master), build-rc (only rc), build-release-branch (only branches matching /^[0-9]*-release$/), build-standalone (only tags) and build-tag (only tags); each runs a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com and registers multiarch/qemu, then pulls $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, builds the Dockerfile with appropriate --build-arg ENV64 and NS values, tags the image with $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA (and $CI_BUILD_TAG when present) and $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, and pushes the tags. In the deploy stage add deploy-devel (only master) and deploy-prod (only tags) jobs using alpine:3.7, installing curl, downloading kubectl, writing the base64‑decoded kube config from $KUBE_CONFIG_DEV or $KUBE_CONFIG_PROD, and running kubectl set image to update the pv-pantahub-www or pv-prod-pantahub-www deployment to $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA.
